name: Paella Mixta
tagline: Saffron rice with chicken, chorizo, peppers — and the prized socarrat
highlight: Don't stir, don't peek, chase the socarrat — soy-free traditional Spanish

hero.alt: Paella with saffron rice, chicken, chorizo, peppers
hero.caption: paella mixta — socarrat hunting

healthFacts: Bomba rice absorbs 3× its volume — perfect for dry, separate grains.

steps.title: Brown chicken and chorizo
steps.detail: Heat olive oil in a paella pan or wide skillet. Brown chicken and chorizo 6 min. Set aside.
steps.tip: Chorizo's paprika oil is your flavor base — don't drain it.

steps.title: Sofrito
steps.detail: Sauté onion, peppers, garlic 8 min. Add grated tomato and paprika; cook 5 min until jam-like.
steps.tip: Sofrito should look almost dry — that concentrated flavor is what backs the rice.

steps.title: Rice meets stock
steps.detail: Stir in rice 1 min to coat. Bloom saffron in a ladle of hot stock; add. Pour in remaining stock. Tuck chicken and chorizo back. Simmer 18 min — DO NOT STIR.
steps.tip: Stirring activates starch and ruins the texture. Bomba is not risotto.

media.alt: Rice cooking in sofrito and stock
media.caption: rice meets stock

steps.title: Hunt the socarrat
steps.detail: Scatter peas in last 5 min. Crank heat for the final 90 sec — listen for crackle. That's the socarrat (caramelized rice crust). Rest 5 min, covered, off heat.
steps.tip: Smell of toasted rice = stop. Burnt = went too far.
